arts.ttl: Paul Pogba needs just one word to describe Jadon Sancho after Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho has made an assist in each of his three Premier League matches with Chelsea to hit the ground running since departing Manchester United on transfer deadline day

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd have NO regrets over Jadon Sancho transfer despite Chelsea form
arts.sum: However, despite a bright start upon his return to the first team, Sancho’s form eventually fizzled out and it was not long before his performances in training were being questioned by Ten Hag, with the public criticism proving to be the breaking point in the pair’s relationship. Sancho was essentially never going to succeed at United after infuriating the club and Ten Hag with his attitude off-the-pitch and inconsistent displays on it, leaving Chelsea to benefit from picking up the pieces of a talented player seeking a fresh start.

arts.ttl: 'Leaving Tottenham for Man Utd was not a tough call – this is what meant most to me'
arts.sum: Teddy Sheringham has explained exactly what led him to make the move from Tottenham to Manchester United in 1997 - and it wasn't down to the goal-scoring opportunities or trophy dreams

arts.ttl: 'I swore at my agent when Man City tried to sign me - I only ever wanted Man Utd'
arts.sum: Dimitar Berbatov has recalled an expletive rant to his agent when Manchester United came knocking for his signature, citing how his dream was to play at Old Trafford and not the Etihad

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag handed Man United sack deadline, board could pull the trigger by then
arts.sum: Manchester United are unhappy with their current start to the season and manager Erik ten Hag is under tremendous pressure. The Dutch manager was expected to guide Manchester United to major trophies this season, but he has failed to get the best out of his team once again. The Red Devils have picked up just […] The post Erik ten Hag handed Man United sack deadline, board could pull the trigger by then appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham drop huge Son Heung-min team news hint for Man United clash amid injury doubt
arts.sum: Under 24 hours later, Postecoglou was asked for an update on Son before Spurs' trip to Old Trafford at the weekend for a Premier League clash against Man United . Following the clash against United, Spurs remain on their travels as they head to Hungary for a European tie against Ferencvaros before then heading to the south coast on Sunday for a Premier League game against Brighton before the October international break commences.

arts.ttl: How Sir Alex Ferguson reacted to Man United star snubbing contract to sign for Spurs
arts.sum: Teddy Sheringham won six major trophies during his four-year spell at Manchester United, including the Premier League, FA Cup and Champions League in 1999

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sack pressure looms after Man Utd's summer transfer failure
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag will hope his side return to winning ways against Tottenham Hotspur after Manchester United fell to consecutive draws against FC Twente and Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson delivered brutal two-word response to Tottenham's title prospects
arts.sum: Man United legend Sir Alex Ferguson was asked earlier this year if he thought Tottenham would ever win the Premier League - and the response was unequivocally clear

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United star Paul Pogba has already shown his true colours about Jadon Sancho
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as former United star Paul Pogba sends praise to Jadon Sancho as the forward's loan spell at Chelsea continues
